postconditions: result == (version == COMPACT_FORMAT_VERSION && kind == ICP_QUERY_KIND_QUERY && target_len >= 1 && target_len <= MAX_PRINCIPAL_LEN && target_present == 1 && method_len >= 1 && method_len <= MAX_QUERY_METHOD_LEN && method_present == 1 && method_utf8 == 1 && arg_present == 1 && arg_len <= MAX_ICP_QUERY_ARG_LEN && consumed_exact == 1)
acceptance_criteria: Accept only compact ICP query inputs with version 1, query kind, bounded target and method, UTF-8 method bytes, present bounded argument bytes, and no trailing data.

test_evidence.test_name: ICP query parser/model PBT and compact parser boundary tests
